title: Bygone Nether Fixes
description: Bygone Nether bugfixes and Eternal Nether features backport
body:
## Bygone Nether Fixes
Bygone Nether bugfixes and Eternal Nether features backport
### Current Fixes
- Shield Spam Fix, now it won't destroy your ears
- EMF compatibility, you can now overwrite BN's entity models using Entity Model Features Mod
- Wraither's texture fix, wraither's second stage doesn't rely on vanilla texture, improving resource pack support
### Current Backports
- Shield Defence Goal backport

### Need more fixes? Need a Forge version?
Join my discord
